name: BEN_QSTNR_RESPONSES
description: BEN_QSTNR_RESPONSES contains responses submitted for the benefits questionnaires.

columns.Name: QSTNR_RESPONSE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BENEFIT_QSTNR_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign Key to BEN_BENEFIT_QSTNR.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: SUBJECT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: CONTEXTUAL_ACTION
columns.Comments: This column holds the contextual action of the survey.

columns.Name: CONTEXT
columns.Comments: This column holds the context of the survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds the foreign key to HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_B.

columns.Name: QSTNR_PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds the foreign key to HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_B.

columns.Name: SUBMIT_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds the date when survey response is submitted.

columns.Name: OBJ_TYPE
columns.Comments: This columns holds the foreign key object name.

columns.Name: OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: This columns holds the foreign key value.

columns.Name: OBJ_CODE
columns.Comments: This columns holds the foreign key code value.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
